seedMessage: Hi, I'm a freelance graphic designer and I'm really struggling with invoicing. Every month it takes me forever to put together invoices in Word and track who has paid. I want something that makes this easier — like an app that already exists, ideally cheap or free. I don't know much about tech stuff.

I'm a developer and I've been using Lumen for API mocking but it's missing features I need — specifically custom response scripting and better team sharing. I want to fork it and add those features. I have a Node.js + React stack and I'm comfortable building this myself. Budget is flexible, just my time.

We're a small business running a 15-year-old Windows desktop app for tracking client jobs and billing. It crashes constantly and our IT person retired. We need to migrate to something modern — probably a web app — and we have budget to do this properly, maybe $15k-$20k. I understand software but I'm not a developer.
I just want better workflow. Things feel disorganized and I waste a lot of time every day but I'm not sure exactly what the problem is or what I need.
I want an app like Notion but simpler — just personal notes with a calendar view and reminders. Notion is too complex for what I need.
